subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye in all your days drink from the Kawthar of mystic knowledge of the Lord of all beings, and become intoxicated with this most pure and resplendent Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در جمیع ایام از کوثر عرفان مالک انام بیاشامید و از این کوثر اطهر انور سرمست
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation
